tasks.label: Push Laboratoire_deploiement to GitHub
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $root='C:\Users\ACONTE\Desktop\Deploiement_labo\Laboratoire_deploiement'; Set-Location $root; if (-not (Test-Path '.git')) { git init }; git branch -M main; if ((git remote | Select-String '^origin$').Length -eq 0) { git remote add origin https://github.com/oumouratou/Laboratoire_deploiement.git } else { git remote set-url origin https://github.com/oumouratou/Laboratoire_deploiement.git }; git add .; git commit -m 'Initial split of Spring Boot, Vue.js, and Flask services' ; git push -u origin main
